title: chilliiiiin posted
description:
The most energetic song i made so far.
 I worked on recreating the snare in A.G. Cook's 'Prismatic', and you can also tell I discovered muting automation here lol. 
 I sampled doja cat and an interview with xaviersobased on Genius.
